eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Chelan, WA; at 1:55 PM on JUL 12, 2026 Effective until 3:55 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Chelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 2 Evacuation Advisory in Lake Chelan. The affected area is Columbia View Road and Atkins Heights Lane. Roads and evacuation routes can become blocked. If you do not leave now, you could be trapped, injured, or killed. For updates check Local Radio, TV or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book.
Repeat.
Chelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 2 Evacuation Advisory in Lake Chelan. The affected area is Columbia View Road and Atkins Heights Lane. Roads and evacuation routes can become blocked. If you do not leave now, you could be trapped, injured, or killed. For updates check Local Radio, TV or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book. Please monitor local radio stations and Chelan County Emergency Management Face book for updates.
